title: 3 Mind-Blowing Facts About Food

segments.text: Chocolate was once used as currency in ancient cultures.
But that’s just the tip of the iceberg.
Honey never spoils; archaeologists found edible honey in tombs.
And bananas are berries, but strawberries aren’t!
So, what’s the wildest food fact you’ve heard?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: These food facts will blow your mind! Follow for daily facts! 🍫
